survive_lava.title: Survive a lava encounter using Magma Gelatin's fire resistance

subtitle.text: Fire resistant. Not fire proof. Know the difference.

description: Magma Gelatin is the most practical food in the Nether.
Fire Resistance 1200 ticks — one full minute.
6.0 saturation. Best fire immunity food in the game.
This is what separates people who explore lava lakes
from people who died in lava lakes.
Crafted from Magma Cream + other Nether ingredients.
Bring several. The Nether does not forgive single-serving prep.
Fire Resistant means lava does not kill you immediately.
It does not mean lava cannot kill you.
Watch your oxygen bar in deep lava pools.
→ Survive a lava encounter using its fire resistance [check]
